properties.remark: BENTON COUNTY SHERIFFS DEPARTMENT FACEBOOK PAGE REPORTS MULTIPLE ACCIDENTS ON INTERSTATE 82 SOUTH OF KENNEWICK DUE TO EXTREMELY LOW VISIBILITY CAUSED BY STRONG WINDS AND BLOWING DUST. INTERSTATE 82 WAS CLOSED UNTIL MID AFTERNOON. 5 PEOPLE HOSPITALIZED WITH NON LIFE-THREATENING INJURIES.
